banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept all", you consent to our use of cookies <link-cookie-policy>Cookie Policy</link-cookie-policy>.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.description:
In order to enhance your browsing experience and enable specific functionalities, we utilize cookies. Below, you will find comprehensive information about each consent category and the associated cookies. The cookies categorized as "Necessary" are essential for enabling the fundamental features of the website and are stored on your browser. Additionally, we utilize third-party cookies to analyze your usage of the website, store your preferences, and provide relevant content and advertisements based on your interests. Prior consent is required for storing these cookies on your browser. You have the option to enable or disable some or all of these cookies, but please note that disabling certain cookies may impact your browsing experience.
Read our <link-cookie-policy>Cookie Policy</link-cookie-policy>.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: To utilize the essential functionalities of this website, like secure log-in and customization of consent preferences, it is necessary to have certain cookies enabled. These cookies do not retain any personally identifiable information.

functional.title: Functional
functional.description: Functional cookies aid in executing specific functionalities on the website, such as sharing website content on social media platforms, gathering feedback, and incorporating other third-party features.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Analytical cookies are employed to gain insights into how visitors engage with the website. They assist in providing information about metrics such as visitor count, bounce rate, traffic source, and more.

advertisement.title: Advertisement
advertisement.description: Advertisement cookies are utilized to deliver personalized advertisements to visitors, taking into account the pages they have previously visited. These cookies also play a role in analyzing the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.

0.title: Account manager of digital service business
0.quote: We integrated this service into our operations and were thoroughly impressed. It provided a seamless experience, enhancing our ability to transact globally with ease. Highly recommended for businesses seeking efficiency in their payment processes.

1.title: Customer story from freelance platform
1.quote: I bill my clients with crypto on a daily basis using GRX Pay. I have been working as a freelancer for the last 5 years and now expanding my payment options to include crypto payments. Great job!

2.title: Partner and COO of a marketing agency
2.quote: Smoothly onboarding and great customer support. The operational principles are clear and easy to grasp.

3.title: Owner of a car rental company
3.quote: I've been in this industry for quite a while, searching for an application that's straightforward and uncomplicated. Honestly, other apps are a maze, but with GRX Pay, everything flows smoothly, making it fast, simple, and incredibly convenient!

descriptions.0:
We are thrilled to join forces with GRX Pay to enhance the payment experience for our customers. This collaboration underscores our commitment to providing innovative solutions that meet evolving needs.

By seamlessly integrating crypto payment options into invoys links, we empower businesses with greater flexibility and convenience in managing their financial processes.
descriptions.1:
As a private jet charter company, PVJets has found GRX Pay to be an exceptional cryptocurrency payment platform. It offers our clients flexibility and ease with secure and efficient transactions.
GRX Pay's support of multiple cryptocurrencies and its user-friendly interface ensure a smooth payment experience, enhancing our service delivery. Highly recommended for businesses integrating crypto payments.
descriptions.2: The Superheroes.Marketing team continues cooperation with GRX Pay. Everything is cool: usability, communication. For our team it is a clear benefit :) We have a positive impression of using this service for our marketing agency.

invoicing.title: Effortless invoicing
invoicing.description: Create, send, and manage your invoices with ease. Invoicing feature allows you to provide the crypto payment method for your clients, customize professional-looking invoices, and receive updates.

autoConvert.title: Auto-convert
autoConvert.description: No need to keep track of crypto volatility — our instant currency exchange system automatically converts your funds into Euro or Tether at the best available rates.

instantEuro.title: Instant Euro withdrawal
instantEuro.description: Access your funds swiftly and securely. No waiting, no hassle — just your money in your account, instantly. Perfect for when you need your funds without delay.

customize.title: Customize your space
customize.description: Reflect your brand's unique identity with our easy-to-use customization features. Effortlessly upload your company logo and update your contact information to ensure your customers know how to reach you.

massPayouts.title: Mass payouts
massPayouts.description: Whether you're paying freelancers, distributing refunds, or handling payroll, GRX Pay ensures secure, swift, and seamless crypto transactions across borders.

apiDocs.title: API and documentation
apiDocs.description: Save your time by configuring the API to automatically process cryptocurrency payments and make payouts.

amlKyb.title: AML & KYB
amlKyb.description: All transactions undergo verification through Chainalysis to ensure that no suspicious activities reach your wallet reduced processing fees and real-time tracking.

rolesPermissions.title: Roles and permissions
rolesPermissions.description: Invite an unlimited number of team members and set each person's permission levels to manage access.

reports.title: Comprehensive reports
reports.description: Our settlement and statement reports are easily accessible for downloading and sharing with your bank.

acceptableCrypto.title: How many currencies do you accept?
acceptableCrypto.subtitle: A lot. Break payment barriers with multi-currency support.

gainAccess.title: Gain access to a $1+ trillion crypto market

meta.title: About us | GRX Pay
meta.description: Our experienced team aimed to provide customers with future-ready Banking solutions operating globally. Our vision is to provide our customers with the freedom of capital without borders.

hero.title: We help reimagine the way business accepts payments
hero.subtitle: The whole point of our work at GRX Pay is to enable more businesses to accept crypto payments, just the way they should. We believe that this process can be made ultimately transparent, simple, and fast. This is why we've created our own solution that meets each of these fundamentals.
hero.imageAlt: Illustration of buying and accepting crypto payments

content.title: About us
content.description: Our experienced team aimed to provide customers with future-ready Banking solutions operating globally. Our vision is to provide our customers with the freedom of capital without borders.
content.title2: Crypto acquiring platform that provides accepting payments in cryptocurrencies for businesses
content.description2: Being the B2B provider, GRX Pay allows clients to easily integrate crypto payments to their payment options, thus increasing income by attracting an audience of cryptocurrency users. Payment acceptance with popular digital assets, invoice and turnover management, auto-conversion, and many other features are combined in a single convenient interface.
content.demoImageAlt: GRX Pay platform interface and crypto payment flow demo

1.title: Seamless integration with multiple crypto payment services
1.description: Our payment processing solution opens access to faster and cheaper transactions, no need for a central authority or intermediary, greater security and privacy, and the ability to make payments anywhere in the world.

2.title: Advanced encryption and security measures
2.description: We implement advanced encryption and security measures to safeguard the integrity of the crypto payment processing, employing features such as two-factor authentication, anti-fraud tools, and real-time monitoring to detect and prevent potential security threats.

3.title: Break payments barriers with multi-currency support
3.description: GRX Pay platform supports 24+ cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, Bitcoin Cash, and many others.

robustSecurity.title: Robust security — your peace of mind prioritized
robustSecurity.description: Start your journey with GRX Pay by registering your account

1.title: Encryption
1.description: GRX Pay utilizes advanced encryption mechanisms to safeguard the integrity of user data and crypto transactions.

2.title: Two-factor authentication
2.description: This additional layer of security checking helps fend off unauthorized log-ins or transactions by requiring an extra verification step in addition to a password.

3.title: Anti-fraud tools
3.description: Boasting a seamless integration with Chainalysis, we help minimize the history of suspicious transactions, making sure the platform remains clean and trustworthy.

4.title: Real-time monitoring
4.description: The set of regular security measures allows us to monitor the system for suspicious activity, reinforcing the protection of our users in real time.

5.title: Secure identity verification
5.description: GRX Pay uses a trusted service, SumSub, for secure user verification during onboarding. SumSub employs strong encryption measures of its own.

smoothIntegration.imageAlt: Smooth integration and API connection illustration
smoothIntegration.title: Smooth integration — getting started in minutes
smoothIntegration.paragraph1: You no longer need to invest months into getting a new payment solution for your business. We have taken care of all the under-the-hood processes and created the integration flow, allowing you to get started with GRX Pay at once using an API key.
smoothIntegration.paragraph2: Once integrated, you won't need to put much manual effort — just delegate payments to the system, and invoices will be generated automatically for your customers. You will be paid in fiat after the payment is processed. Find the comprehensive guide in our documentation <link-documentation>here</link-documentation>.
smoothIntegration.paragraph3: GRX Pay offers painless integration and fast adoption of all the benefits of faster and more cost-effective transactions achieved through protected, smooth crypto payments available globally.

empowerCta.imageAlt: Background for empower your business with crypto payments
empowerCta.title: Empower your business with crypto payments using GRX Pay
empowerCta.subtitle: Get started with GRX Pay today. What are you waiting for?
